# Indie.box

> Indie.box is a private AI appliance for businesses. It runs large language models, document analysis, and AI agents entirely on-premise - no cloud, no data leaving the network. Plug in, set up in minutes, ready to use.

Indie.box is a physical AI box designed for small and medium-sized businesses that need AI capabilities without sending data to external services. All AI processing happens locally on the device. Models run on-premise, documents are processed locally, and no data is transmitted to American cloud services. Primary use cases: document chat, back-office automation, internal knowledge search, and AI agents connected to business systems.

## Product

- [Indie.box Homepage](https://indiebox.ai/): Private AI appliance for the office. Includes OpenWebUI interface, local LLM support, document analysis, and workflow automation. Ships as a ready-to-use hardware unit.
- [English Homepage](https://indiebox.ai/en/): English version of the product homepage.

## Key Features

- **Local AI processing**: All LLM inference runs on-device. No data leaves the network.
- **OpenWebUI interface**: Browser-based chat interface accessible from any device on the local network.
- **Document analysis**: Chat with PDFs, contracts, and internal documents without uploading them to a cloud service.
- **AI agents and workflows**: Automate multi-step business processes using local AI agents.
- **Multiple models**: Supports a range of open-source LLMs. Models can be switched and updated.
- **Ready out of the box**: Plug in, connect to the network, start using within minutes. No IT expertise required.

## Operations

- [Operations](https://indiebox.ai/betriebs.html): Technical details on setup, updates, monitoring, and support for the Indie.box in a business environment.

## Privacy

- [Privacy Principles](https://indiebox.ai/privacy.html): How Indie.box implements privacy by design - all data stays local, no cloud dependency, GDPR-compliant by architecture.

## Company

Indie.box is developed by brainbot GmbH, based in Mainz, Germany. Founded in 2000 as a spin-off of the German Research Center for Artificial Intelligence (DFKI). brainbot also builds AI agents for enterprise use cases and privacy infrastructure for blockchain networks.

## Contact

- [Buy Indie.box](https://indiebox.ai/checkout.html): Order the device directly.
- brainbot GmbH, Taunusstrasse 61, 55120 Mainz, Germany
